stemHtml:
Refer to figure. 
According to NOTAM H5669/14, taxiway(s)…

options.a: F and B3, between taxiways B and C, are not available on the 15th January 2015 at 13:00 UTC.
options.b: B2 between taxiways DOM1 and B, is not available to all traffic on the 15th January 2015 at 13:00 UTC.
options.c: C between taxiways B2 and G, is not available on the 18th January 2015 at 12:00 local time.
options.d: B4 between taxiways B and DOM2, is not available on the 10th January 2015 at 11:00 UTC.
